item.title: SIM Card Data Recovery Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: SIM Card Data Recovery Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
SIM Card Data Recovery Tool
(Office Apps)
Are you worried about formatted text messages from cell phone? Download and install best SIM Card Data Recovery Tool from recommended URL www.recover.co.in to regain permanently deleted contact details along with person’s name lost due to improper SIM handling or any logical error. Inbuilt help manual feature of software empowers non technical user easily recover erased sent messages with report of sending date, time and location. Cost effective data rescue utility recovers all deleted information of formatted SIM card in few minutes.

[read more]

item.title: Mac Digital Pictures Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Digital Pictures Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Digital Pictures Recovery
(Utilities)
No matter what the operating system you are using, photo loss can take place from different storage media drives like digital camera memory card, SD card, pen drive, USB flash drive even Mac hard drive. With the evaluation of highly developed recovery solutions, all computer users easily restore deleted photos and pictures from formatted digital hard drives. Mac Digital Pictures Recovery software is one of them that performs safe and instant recovery of mistakenly lost digital stills, wallpapers, wedding albums and other kinds of images from all kinds of portable or fixed hard drives.

[read more]

item.title: Digicam Picture Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Digicam Picture Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
Digicam Picture Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Digital Camera recovery software is a reliable solution to recover your lost deleted pictures, audio, images, video and photo files. Retrieval utility can rescue deleted photos, snaps, clips even if media is corrupted or memory card is being pulled out while camera was switch on. This non destructive application is safe and easy to use and support all type of Digicam or handy cameras including point and shoot cameras, specialty cameras, prosumer cameras, professional cameras, novelty cameras, digital video cameras of different pixels. Extraction program performs quick scanning of the storage media to store and locates the missing pictures and stored data. After complete scanning the images found in the storage media is displayed in thumbnails and in hierarchal structure from where you can view and easily copy recovered pictures and save them to a user specified folder or directory.Shareware application can supports all type of digital cameras of any branded manufacturers like Canon, Epson, Fuji Film, Hewlett-Packard (HP), Kodak, Konica-Minolta, Nikon, Toshiba, Olympus, Panasonic, Sony, Samsung Acer, Hitachi, Yashica, Casio, Pentax, Leica, Mitsubishi, Sanyo, Ricoh, HP, IBM, Fujitsu, Digital Dream, Yakumo etc. Utility can revive missing content from any mmc, XD, mini, micro memory card or from USB drive. It is capable to revive any extensions of multimedia files like jpg, gif, bmp, jpeg, avi, mov, mpeg, etc.Features:* Utility works with all windows operating systems including longhorn.* It comes with simple to use GUI.* Capable to rescue data while drive not formatted message displayed on your computer screen.* Provides data retrieval support for USB drive including compact flash, memory card, pocket PC, PDA computers, mobile phone communicator, smart media, multimedia card, SD card etc.* Works with all multimedia files of digital cameras.

[read more]
item.description:
Digicam Picture Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Digital Camera recovery software is a reliable solution to recover your lost deleted pictures, audio, images, video and photo files. Retrieval utility can rescue deleted photos, snaps, clips even if media is corrupted or memory card is being pulled out while camera was switch on. This non destructive application is safe and easy to use and support all type of Digicam or handy cameras including point and shoot cameras, specialty cameras, prosumer cameras, professional cameras, novelty cameras, digital video cameras of different pixels. It is capable to revive any extensions of multimedia files like jpg, gif, bmp, jpeg, avi, mov, mpeg, etc.Features:* Utility works with all windows operating systems including longhorn.* It comes with simple to use GUI.* Capable to rescue data while drive not formatted message displayed on your computer screen.* Provides data retrieval support for USB drive including compact flash, memory card, pocket PC, PDA computers, mobile phone communicator, smart media, multimedia card, SD card etc.* Works with all multimedia files of digital cameras.

[read more]

item.title: Picture Undelete Software Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Picture Undelete Software Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
Picture Undelete Software Mac
(Utilities)
Easy to use Picture Undelete Software Mac is able to recollect completely deleted photographs from logically corrupted pen drive in just few minutes. Macintosh picture salvaging utility facilitates users to recoup all snapshots from USB drive lost due to various reasons of data loss including virus attacks, human mistakes, sudden power failure, data loss during file transfer, improper device handling, software crash, hardware problem or many others conveniently.

[read more]

item.title: Undelete Digital Camera Photo [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Undelete Digital Camera Photo [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Undelete Digital Camera Photo
(Utilities)
Digital camera image recovery undelete tool retrieves damaged lost snaps, photos and clips from accidently deleted MMC, micro SD, Mini Card and Smart Media Card. Retrieval software fetches images like BMP JPEG RIFF TIFF and audio video files MPEG MOV WAV AVI and MIDI extension file. Digital camera photos uneraser tool restores data from accidently formatted or virus infected canon Sony Nikon Panasonic and Olympus digital camera.

item.title: Data Recovery Tools [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery Tools [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery Tools
(Utilities)
Data recovery tools is fully functional to retrieve all crashed folders saved in different kind of memory card like compact flash, MMC, XD and many more. Download DDR professional recovery software from www.recover.co.in that allows user to recover all corrupted files and folder just in few mouse movements. Reliable data recovery tools allows user to bring back all deleted or misplaced audio/video files saved in formatted disk storage. Innovative Data recovery tools helps user in regaining overall corrupted folders due to unexpected power failure. Best DDR recovery application makes you capable in restoring erased data due to virus/worm infection and other lost situations. Data recovery program provides best way to get back all corrupted files along with thumbnail preview options. File recovery software is useful in regaining lost or missed files that are saved in different format or extensions. Comprehensive data recovery program allows user to salvage all corrupted information from your system without affecting their original solution. Best DDR professional recovery application offers you advanced technique to restore entire corrupted data without need of any expert help and guidance. Data recovery software allows user to retrieve all erased data from logically inaccessible memory card like compact flash card, multimedia memory card and many more.Features:* Data recovery tool recover erased files and folder saved in different location on inaccessible Windows hard disk drives.* DDR professional recovery software provides best way to get back crashed folders without loss in their original format.* Simple to use and provides user friendly interface to make recovery process easier and simpler for entire user.* Data recovery software provides high quality file recovery service just in few clicks of mouse and minimal cost.

[read more]

item.title: Recover USB Data Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover USB Data Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
Recover USB Data Mac
(Utilities)
Economical erased data restoration software for Apple Mac users provides best solution to recover formatted digital images from logically completely damaged removable media storage drive in just few easy mouse clicks. Mac erased data restoration tool recover crucial business documents lost due to accidental deletion, power surges, improper handling of drive, virus attack etc. Professional data retrieval application for Apple Macintosh provides integrated solution to restores lost documents from removable media device including jump drive, memory stick, flash card mp3 player etc. Digital media data repairing software retrieves erased text files from all major capacity like 512 Mb, 1Gb, 2Gb, 4Gb, 8Gb or even higher. Mac data recovery software has non destructive, read only utility to restore formatted media files in original file format without affecting system settings. USB drive data restoration tool has advance search option to recuperate albums or digital snaps even when memory stick is plugged out in running mode. Erased data revival software for Apple Macintosh OS X has advance recovery algorithm to locate deleted media files from inaccessible compact flash card. Mac data repairing software has user friendly GUI wizard which facilitates non technical users to restore corrupted text documents. USB drive data repairing software restores lost files from all major brands of removable media storage drive such as Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, Lexar, Toshiba, IBM, HP, Lexar etc. Software features: * Technically advance data salvage tool for Mac revives formatted photo albums from inaccessible removable media storage drive. * USB digital media data recovery software retrieves erased photos and facilitates to save repaired files in all major file formats. * Mac data recovery software retrieves encrypted or compressed media files with full support to long localized filename.

[read more]
